accessibility_features.name: Wheelchair Accessible
accessibility_features.description: Step-free access with widened doorways and accessible circulation space suitable for standard wheelchairs.

accessibility_features.name: Roll-in Shower
accessibility_features.description: Bathroom with a level-access, roll-in shower, grab bars, handheld showerhead, and non-slip flooring.

accessibility_features.name: Visual Fire Alarm
accessibility_features.description: Strobe light fire and emergency alarms for guests with hearing impairments.

accessibility_features.name: Hearing Assistance System
accessibility_features.description: Assistive listening devices available in selected venues and meeting rooms.

accessibility_features.name: Step-free Pool Access
accessibility_features.description: Ramped or lift access into the main pool area without stairs.

activities.name: Sunset Beach Yoga
activities.description: A gentle yoga session on the beach timed with the sunset, focused on stretching and relaxation.

activities.name: Pirate Treasure Hunt Adventure
activities.description: Guided pirate-themed treasure hunt around the gardens and beach, with clues, maps, and small prizes.

activities.name: Kids’ Splash Games
activities.description: Supervised water relay races and splash games designed for younger swimmers in the kids’ pool.
activities.location: Kids’ Pool at Main Pool Complex

activities.name: Junior Reef Snorkeling Safari
activities.description: Guided snorkeling tour over the nearby coral reef with instruction tailored to kids and beginners.

activities.name: Family Beach Olympics
activities.description: Fun team challenges on the sand including sack races, tug-of-war, and beach volleyball matches.

activities.name: Little Chefs Cooking Class
activities.description: A hands-on cooking workshop where kids create their own mini pizzas and fruit desserts.

activities.name: Stand-Up Paddle Lagoon Tour
activities.description: Guided stand-up paddleboarding across the calm lagoon with a short skills introduction.

activities.name: Sunset Catamaran Cruise
activities.description: Evening cruise with canapés and soft drinks, offering panoramic views of the coastline at sunset.

activities.name: Island Mixology Masterclass
activities.description: Interactive cocktail-making workshop with our head bartender, including recipe cards to take home.

activities.name: Morning Beach Bootcamp
activities.description: High-energy circuit training session on the sand combining cardio and strength exercises.

activities.name: Kids’ Outdoor Movie Night
activities.description: Family-friendly film screening under the stars with beanbags and popcorn.

activities.name: Reef Conservation Talk
activities.description: Educational session led by our marine biologist about local reef life and conservation efforts.

activities.name: Intro to Archery
activities.description: Beginner archery lesson with safety briefing and instruction on our outdoor range.

amenities.name: Private Balcony
amenities.description: Private furnished balcony attached to the room or suite.

amenities.name: Ocean View
amenities.description: Unobstructed views of the ocean from the room or suite.

amenities.name: Pool View
amenities.description: Views overlooking the resort’s main pool area.

amenities.name: Roll-in Shower
amenities.description: Accessible, level-entry shower with grab bars and handheld showerhead.

amenities.name: Wheelchair-Accessible Room
amenities.description: Room with accessible layout, wider doors, and lowered fixtures.

amenities.name: Ground Floor Location
amenities.description: Room located on the ground floor with step-free access.

amenities.name: Spa Access
amenities.description: Complimentary access to spa relaxation areas such as sauna and steam room.

amenities.name: Kids’ Club Access
amenities.description: Access to supervised kids’ club activities and play areas.

amenities.name: Pool Bar
amenities.description: Swim-up bar serving drinks and light snacks by the main pool.

amenities.name: Poolside Cabanas
amenities.description: Private shaded cabanas with loungers and dedicated service.

amenities.name: Kids’ Pool
amenities.description: Shallow pool area designed specifically for children.

amenities.name: Projector
amenities.description: Ceiling-mounted or portable projector for presentations.

amenities.name: Coffee Break Catering
amenities.description: Selection of coffee, tea, juices, and snacks served during meeting breaks.

amenities.name: Outdoor Terrace Seating
amenities.description: Dining tables located on an open-air terrace.

amenities.name: Vegetarian Menu Options
amenities.description: Clearly marked vegetarian dishes available on the menu.

amenities.name: Female Therapists Available
amenities.description: Option to request a female spa therapist when booking treatments.

amenities.name: Blackout Curtains
amenities.description: Full blackout curtains for improved sleep quality.

event_service_options.name: LCD Projector & Screen
event_service_options.description: High-lumen LCD projector with HDMI connectivity and a large projection screen.

event_service_options.name: Standard Coffee Break
event_service_options.description: Mid-morning or afternoon coffee break with coffee, tea, water, and assorted pastries.

event_service_options.name: PA Sound System
event_service_options.description: Conference-grade sound system with microphones and speakers.

event_service_options.name: Flipchart & Markers
event_service_options.description: Flipchart stand with paper pads and colored markers for brainstorming sessions.

event_service_options.name: Dedicated High-Speed Wi-Fi
event_service_options.description: Private high-bandwidth Wi-Fi network for meeting attendees.

hotspot_categories.name: Pool Bar
hotspot_categories.description: Swim-up and poolside bars serving drinks and light snacks.

hotspot_categories.name: Kids’ Pool
hotspot_categories.description: Shallow pools and splash zones designed for children.

hotspot_categories.name: Cabanas
hotspot_categories.description: Private shaded cabanas located around the main pool and beachfront.

hotspot_categories.name: Restaurants
hotspot_categories.description: All-day dining venues, specialty restaurants, and snack bars.

hotspot_categories.name: Spa & Wellness
hotspot_categories.description: Spa reception, treatment rooms, relaxation lounges, and wellness facilities.

hotspot_categories.name: Meeting Rooms
hotspot_categories.description: Conference and meeting spaces available for events and corporate functions.

offers.name: Stay 5 Nights, Save 20%
offers.description: Enjoy 20% off our best available rate when you stay for 5 nights or more.
offers.terms_and_conditions: Offer applies to new bookings only. Minimum stay of 5 consecutive nights required. Subject to availability and blackout dates.

offers.name: Early Bird 10% Off
offers.description: Book at least 30 days in advance and receive 10% off the nightly rate.
offers.terms_and_conditions: Non-refundable advance purchase rate. Full prepayment required at time of booking.

offers.name: Suite Escape 25% Off
offers.description: Save 25% on spacious suites with breakfast included.
offers.terms_and_conditions: Offer valid on suite categories only. Minimum 3-night stay required. Blackout dates may apply.

offers.name: Family Fun Getaway – 18% Off
offers.description: Family package with 18% off, daily breakfast, and kids’ club access for two children.
offers.terms_and_conditions: Rate includes access to kids’ club. Children must be registered guests. Limited availability.

offers.name: Spa Indulgence – 15% Room & Treatment Credit
offers.description: Save 15% on your room and receive a spa credit for treatments during your stay.
offers.terms_and_conditions: Spa credit is non-refundable and must be used during the stay. Advance spa reservations recommended.

offers.name: Honeymoon Romance – 12% Off & Perks
offers.description: Special honeymoon rate with 12% off, welcome champagne, and romantic turndown service.
offers.terms_and_conditions: Marriage certificate dated within 12 months may be requested at check-in.

offers.name: Meetings Value Offer – 15% Off Rooms
offers.description: Book a residential meeting and receive 15% off room rates for delegates.
offers.terms_and_conditions: Requires a minimum of 10 guest rooms per night and a confirmed meeting room booking.

offers.name: Villa Retreat – 30% Long Stay Savings
offers.description: Stay 7 nights or more in a villa and save 30% on your accommodation.
offers.terms_and_conditions: Offer valid for villa categories only. Limited availability during peak periods.

offers.name: Shoulder Season Escape – 14% Off
offers.description: Enjoy 14% off selected dates during our quieter shoulder seasons.
offers.terms_and_conditions: Valid only on specified shoulder season dates. Subject to change without notice.

offers.name: Last-Minute Flash Sale – 20% Off
offers.description: Get 20% off when booking within 5 days of arrival.
offers.terms_and_conditions: Full prepayment required. Non-refundable and non-changeable.

restaurants.name: Sea Breeze Terrace
restaurants.description: Open-air Mediterranean restaurant with panoramic ocean views and a strong focus on fresh, seasonal ingredients.
restaurants.dietary_notes: Extensive vegetarian and vegan options clearly marked; gluten-free pasta available on request.

restaurants.name: Lagoon Grill & Bar
restaurants.description: Casual grill and bar by the main pool serving burgers, salads, and tropical cocktails.
restaurants.dietary_notes: Vegetarian burgers, salads, and children’s vegetarian menu items available.

restaurants.name: Coral Reef
restaurants.description: Elegant fine-dining restaurant featuring contemporary coastal cuisine and an extensive wine list.
restaurants.dietary_notes: A curated vegetarian tasting menu is available with 24 hours’ notice.

restaurants.name: Sunrise Café
restaurants.description: All-day buffet restaurant offering international favorites for breakfast, lunch, and dinner.
restaurants.dietary_notes: Daily vegetarian hot dishes and salad bar, with allergens labeled.

restaurants.name: Island Sushi Bar
restaurants.description: Intimate sushi bar showcasing fresh sashimi, maki, and signature rolls.
restaurants.dietary_notes: Vegetarian sushi rolls and miso soup available; limited vegan options.

restaurants.name: Beach Shack Tacos
restaurants.description: Colorful beachside kiosk specializing in tacos, ceviche, and frozen margaritas.
restaurants.dietary_notes: Grilled vegetable tacos and bean-based fillings available; ask about dairy-free options.

restaurants.name: Azure Lobby Lounge
restaurants.description: Relaxed lounge in the lobby serving coffee, pastries, and light bar snacks.
restaurants.dietary_notes: Vegetarian sandwiches and salads; plant-based milk available for coffee.

restaurants.name: Harbor Steakhouse
restaurants.description: Classic steakhouse offering premium cuts, seafood, and a curated wine selection.
restaurants.dietary_notes: Limited vegetarian items; please contact the restaurant for special requests.

spa_services.name: 60-minute Relaxation Massage
spa_services.description: Full-body Swedish-style massage using gentle, flowing strokes to ease tension and promote deep relaxation.

spa_services.name: 90-minute Deep Tissue Massage
spa_services.description: Intensive massage focused on deeper muscle layers to relieve chronic tension and sports-related soreness.

spa_services.name: 75-minute Hot Stone Massage
spa_services.description: Therapeutic massage combining warm basalt stones and soothing oils to melt away stress.

spa_services.name: Island Glow Facial
spa_services.description: Hydrating 60-minute facial customized to your skin type with gentle exfoliation and mask.

spa_services.name: Express Refresher Facial
spa_services.description: 30-minute facial focused on cleansing, exfoliation, and hydration for a quick glow.

spa_services.name: Tropical Island Body Scrub
spa_services.description: Exfoliating body treatment with coconut and sea salt to leave skin soft and polished.

spa_services.name: After-Sun Soothing Wrap
spa_services.description: Cooling aloe and chamomile body wrap designed to soothe sun-exposed skin.

spa_services.name: Couples Retreat Massage
spa_services.description: Side-by-side 75-minute relaxation massage in a private couples’ suite.

spa_services.name: Guided Yoga & Meditation
spa_services.description: 60-minute session combining gentle stretching with guided meditation in the spa pavilion.

meeting_rooms.name: Reef Meeting Room
meeting_rooms.description: Mid-size meeting room with natural light, ideal for seminars, product launches, and training sessions.

meeting_rooms.name: Coral Conference Hall
meeting_rooms.description: Large pillar-free ballroom that can host conferences, gala dinners, and social events with flexible staging.

meeting_rooms.name: Lagoon Boardroom
meeting_rooms.description: Executive boardroom with a fixed table, ergonomic chairs, and integrated AV connections.

meeting_rooms.name: Ocean View Pavilion
meeting_rooms.description: Open-plan pavilion with retractable walls and ocean views, perfect for retreats and strategy days.

meeting_rooms.name: Sandbar Breakout Room
meeting_rooms.description: Smaller breakout space used for workshops, syndicate groups, and interviews.

meeting_rooms.name: Garden Terrace Tent
meeting_rooms.description: Semi-open marquee on the garden terrace suitable for casual meetings, cocktail receptions, and exhibitions.

room_types.name: Standard Garden Room
room_types.description: Comfortable guest room with views of the resort gardens, ideal for couples or solo travelers.

room_types.name: Superior Garden Room - Triple
room_types.description: Spacious garden-view room with an additional sofa bed, suitable for small families.

room_types.name: Ocean View King Room
room_types.description: King-bedded room with a Juliet balcony and sweeping views over the ocean.

room_types.name: Deluxe Ocean View Family Room
room_types.description: Family-friendly ocean-view room with a king bed and sofa bed, plus a furnished balcony.

room_types.name: Premium Ocean View Room
room_types.description: Upgraded ocean-view room on a high floor with enhanced amenities and a larger balcony.

room_types.name: Pool View Room
room_types.description: Bright guest room overlooking the main pool complex, close to the resort’s leisure facilities.

room_types.name: Accessible Garden Room - Ground Floor
room_types.description: Wheelchair-accessible ground-floor room with step-free access, roll-in shower, and garden patio.

room_types.name: Junior Ocean Suite
room_types.description: Open-plan junior suite with a lounge area, large balcony, and panoramic ocean views.

room_types.name: One-Bedroom Ocean Suite
room_types.description: Separate bedroom and living room, walk-in closet, and expansive balcony facing the ocean.

room_types.name: Garden Junior Suite
room_types.description: Junior suite with a spacious seating area and tranquil garden-facing terrace.

room_types.name: Two-Bedroom Beachfront Villa
room_types.description: Standalone villa with private plunge pool, direct beach access, and two ensuite bedrooms.

room_types.name: Penthouse Ocean Suite
room_types.description: Flagship penthouse with a large terrace, outdoor jacuzzi, and 270-degree ocean views.
